message:
Fix memory leaks in Overlay and CanvasSequenceGridRenderer

Overlay focus tracking cleanup:
- Add useEffect cleanup to delete PREVIOUS_FOCUS_BY_OVERLAY_ID entry on unmount
- Prevents DOM element references from being retained after overlay is removed
- Without cleanup, closing/reopening overlays accumulates stale entries
- Uses overlay id captured in closure to ensure correct key is deleted

CanvasSequenceGridRenderer dispose() improvements:
- Clear rowTileCache to release offscreen canvas memory
- Null out backCtx and backBuffer references
- Allows garbage collection of canvas memory when renderer is disposed
- Important for long sessions with multiple phage switches

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
